form.title: Create new load request
form.subtitle: We'll find the most efficient empty-leg truck near your origin.

features.title: Smart Deadhead Discovery
features.desc: We tap into over 5,000 trucks returning empty to their home cities.

features.title: Guaranteed Verified Drivers
features.desc: Every truck on LoadLink is ULIP-verified with clean safety records.

features.title: Instant Asset Tracking
features.desc: From the second you book, get millisecond-latency GPS tracking.

selection.title: Shipment Published
selection.subtitle: Your load is now visible to the Match Engine. We are calculating the most efficient truck alignments in real-time.
selection.waiting_desc: New matches will appear here automatically as soon as drivers bid.

toast.login_required: Please log in to book a shipment
toast.match_accepted: Match accepted! Routing to active shipments.
